id: 20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互
title: 优化 YPI Studio 异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互

subagents.prompt: 请为当前 YPI Studio 任务形成技术方案。背景：用户反馈“并行情况 chat 竟然直接停止，整个体系有问题；并行本来为了方便用户，现在让用户更困难”。现有 brief 已描述：implementationPlan 中 async implementer 子任务完成后主 session 不会自动 collect/续跑，用户必须反复输入继续；并行/后台语义不清。请重点设计：1) 自动续跑/continuation 机制，如何在子进程 terminal 后推进主编排；2)…

Handoff:

- Produced/updated artifacts:
  - `.ypi/tasks/20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互/prd.md`
  - `.ypi/tasks/20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互/design.md`
  - `.ypi/tasks/20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互/implement.md`
  - `.ypi/tasks/20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互/checks.md`
  - `.ypi/tasks/20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互/handoff.md`

- Key design decision proposed:
  - Add deterministic YPI Studio implementation orchestrator.
  - Auto dispatch ready `subtaskId` implementer runs after approval.
  - Do not wake the main LLM for every subtask; only notify/continue Chat at terminal boundaries such as completed or needs_attention.
  - Preserve `awaiting_approval` gate.

- Validation run:
  - Parsed the `json ypi-implementation-plan` block in `implement.md` successfully.
  - Did not run lint/tsc because only planning docs were changed.

- Remaining decisions needed from main session/user:
  1. Should “开始实现” default to auto-run full implementationPlan?
  2. After all implementation subtasks complete, should MVP auto transition to `checking`, or only show `checker_required` attention?
  3. Should normal Chat Abort pause Studio auto-run, or should Studio have separate Pause/Cancel controls? Current recommendation: separate controls.

No production code changed; no commit/push/merge performed.

from pathlib import Path

p=Path('.ypi/tasks/20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互/implement.md')
s=p.read_text()

assert m, 'missing block'
obj=json.loads(m.group(1))
print('ok', len(obj['subtasks']))
PY",

}

transcript.taskId: 20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互

subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — 新增 compact subtask timeline、`YpiStudioSessionRuntimeProjection`、`waiting_for_studio_children` 状态契约；widget projection 兼容携带新字段。
- `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — 从现有 implementation progress 派生 `compactTimeline` 与 `sessionRuntime`，旧任务无 plan/progress 时仍返回 undefined。
- `lib/ypi-studio-session-link.ts` — 将 compact timeline / session runtime 裁剪后投影到 session widget/chat API。
- `hooks/useAgentSession.ts` — 增加共享 runtime 状态类型，包含 `waiting_for_studio_children`。
- `components/AppShell.tsx` — 将当前 Studio session task projection 传入 Chat。
- `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — 当主 agent idle 但 Studio implementation 有 queued/running 子任务时显示“Studio 后台仍在工作 / 正在等待并行子任务”横幅，并展示 compact timeline；needs_user 时显示需处理状态。
- `docs/architecture/overview.md`、`docs/modules/api.md`、`docs/modules/frontend.md`、`docs/modules/library.md` — 更新 projection / Chat waiting state 文档。

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- 本子任务只实现状态契约、projection 与 Chat 可见等待态；未实现 terminal callback / 主 Chat continuation loop。
- 工作区已有与 Browser Share 相关的未提交/未跟踪改动，本次未处理。

transcript.taskId: 20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互

subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-subagent-runtime.ts` — added parent-session continuation callback registry and idempotent terminal continuation scheduling keyed by `parentSessionId:taskId:runId`.
- `lib/rpc-manager.ts` — registers live session continuation callbacks and sends a lightweight `followUp` prompt to the same parent session after async child terminal, retrying while parent is streaming.
- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — async `ypi_studio_subagent` runs now carry continuation metadata and schedule parent continuation after final persistence.
- `docs/architecture/overview.md` — documented async child terminal continuation behavior.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented runtime continuation registry responsibility.

#### Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed
- `npm run lint` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Continuation is best-effort and requires the parent session wrapper to still be alive; if unavailable, persisted run can still be collected manually.
- This subtask only implements terminal wake-up/continuation. UI waiting-state work remains for the next planned subtask.
- No independent orchestrator was introduced; the follow-up prompt tells the main session to use existing `collect -> implementation_next -> claim/dispatch` flow and not bypass approval gates.

itemsPreview.text:
# handoff

## Artifacts produced

- `prd.md`：定义自动续跑目标、范围、验收标准、非目标和待确认产品决策。
- `design.md`：提出 deterministic implementation orchestrator + terminal boundary Chat continuation 方案，覆盖后端状态契约、运行流、UI 状态、API/tool、失败边界、风险与分阶段落地。
- `implement.md`：给出实现拆解和 `json ypi-implementation-plan` 草案，尚未保存到 `task.json` implementationPlan。
- `checks.md`：给出需求覆盖、自动验证、人工验收和回归风险清单。

## Validation run

- 未运行代码验证；本轮仅更新 Studio 规划文档，未改生产代码。

## Remaining risks

- 已确认：用户说“开始实现”后默认自动跑完整 implementationPlan。
- 已确认：implementation 全部完成后自动 transition 到 `checking` 并派发 checker，保持非并行流程一致体验。
- 已修正表达：面向用户不说 Abort/managed run，统一用“先停一下/继续跑/取消正在跑的任务”等人话。
- 技术风险集中在 child runner 抽取、orchestrator tick 幂等、session_destroy 不误杀后台 run、runtime_lost 恢复语义。

## Recommended next step

主会话审阅 PRD/Design 后，将 `implement.md` 中的 machine-readable plan 保存为任务 `implementationPlan`，把任务切到 `awaiting_approval`，等待用户确认后再进入实现。

itemsPreview.inputPreview:
{
  "path": ".ypi/tasks/20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互/handoff.md",
  "content": "# handoff

## Artifacts produced

- `prd.md`：定义自动续跑目标、范围、验收标准、非目标和待确认产品决策。
- `design.md`：提出 deterministic implementation orchestrator + terminal boundary Chat continuation 方案，覆盖后端状态契约、运行流、UI 状态、API/tool、失败边界、风险与分阶段落地。
- `implement.md`：给出实现拆解和 `json ypi-implementation-plan` 草案。
- `checks.md`：给出需求覆盖、自动验证、人工验收和回归风险清单。
- 子任务 `keep-chat-active-ui` 实现：Chat / Session Widget 复用 `sessionRuntime` 与 compact timeline 显示等待并行子任务、后台仍在工作、需要用户处理和精简子任务状态。

## Files changed in `keep-chat-active-ui`

- `components/ChatWindow.tsx`：接入 `studioTask` projection；当主 agent 不在 streaming 但 Studio runtime 为 `waiting_for_studio_children` / `needs_user` 时显示后台等待 banner、运行/完成/等待/失败/阻塞摘要和 5 条 compact timeline。
- `components/YpiStudioSessionWidget.tsx`：显示 runtime 状态、active/queued/ready counts，并优先使用 compact timeline 展示 3–5 个异常/活跃/最近子任务。
- `components/AppShell.tsx`：Studio task polling 在等待子任务或需要用户处理时保持快速刷新。
- `docs/modules/frontend.md`：更新 Chat、Widget、AppShell 前端模块说明。

## Validation run

- `npm run lint` — passed。
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed。

## Remaining risks

- 未做浏览器手工验收；建议主会话/检查员用一个含并行子任务的 Studio task 验证 banner、widget 与轮询节奏。
- 本子任务只实现前端等待态展示，不实现 terminal callback / 自动续跑后端状态机。

## Recommended next step

继续后续子任务：让子任务 terminal 自动唤醒同一主 session 的 continuation loop，并由主 session 继续 collect / dispatch / checking。
"
}

- `components/AppShell.tsx` — Studio task polling 在等待子任务或需要用户处理时保持快速刷新。
- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — 更新前端模块说明。
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — 更新本子任务交付记录。

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- 未做浏览器手工验收；建议用一个含并行 implementation subtasks 的 Studio task 验证 Chat banner 与 Widget 状态。
- 本子任务仅覆盖前端等待态展示，不实现后端 terminal callback / continuation loop。
Child Pi agent finished.

Added idle-timeout deferral while Studio child runs are still active.

- `npm run test:studio-policy` — passed
- `npm run test:studio-dag` — passed

itemsPreview.text:
> @alan-zhao/yolk-pi-web@0.7.7 lint
> eslint .

diff --git a/docs/architecture/overview.md b/docs/architecture/overview.md
index aca4e88..27d9878 100644
--- a/docs/architecture/overview.md
+++ b/docs/architecture/overview.md
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ The archive directory is scanned separately from `SessionManager.listAll()` (whi
 - Auth changes call `reloadRpcAuthState()` so live AgentSessions reload auth/model state. The same path also cleans pi-ai session resources because OpenAI Codex keeps reusable WebSockets keyed by session id, and those sockets must reconnect after ChatGPT account activation to pick up new auth headers.
 - ChatGPT usage auto-refresh is backend-owned, not browser-tab-owned. The scheduler state lives on `globalThis.__piChatGptUsageRefreshScheduler` and uses `~/.pi/agent/chatgpt-usage-refresh.lock` to reduce duplicate refresh loops across Node processes. Stale lock detection follows the configured refresh cycle dynamically.
 - Trellis subagent child processes resolve model policy from `pi-web.json` `trellis.subagents`: explicit tool input wins, then per-agent fixed policy, then optional route table policy, then default policy, then `.pi/agents/*` frontmatter, then Pi CLI defaults. Automatic routing is opt-in and classifies `text`/`multimodal` plus `simple`/`standard`/`complex`/`critical`; router failures fall back to configured safe route/default behavior. The default policy follows the main session model when the Pi extension context exposes it; otherwise it safely falls back to Pi default. If the selected child model process fails, existing `.pi/agents/*` `fallbackModels` frontmatter entries are retried in order; if those also fail and the main session model is known, the child finally falls back to the main session model.
-- YPI Studio workflow orchestration is loaded as a built-in extension factory from `lib/rpc-manager.ts` so every web-created AgentSession receives the `ypi_studio_task` and `ypi_studio_subagent` tools plus `/studio-init`, `/studio-start`, `/studio-feature`, `/studio-bugfix`, `/studio-ui`, `/studio-continue`, `/studio-check`, and `/studio-archive` commands regardless of the selected workspace's project-local `.pi` files. The extension injects `.ypi/tasks` workflow state and bounded `.ypi/knowledge` summaries into each turn, binds sessions through stable context ids (`pi_<sessionId>` first, transcript hash second, process fallback last), resolves Studio member model/thinking policies through the pure `lib/ypi-studio-policy.ts` chain `toolInput > memberConfig > defaultPolicy > followMain > piDefault`, canonicalizes member ids before config/member-file lookup, emits policy diagnostics/warnings in live progress and final tool results, isolates child member Pi processes from Trellis injection with child env flags, and stores structured task progress under the selected workspace's `.ypi/` directory. Studio tasks may also contain `implementationPlan` plus `implementationProgress`: architects save a structured subtask plan before `awaiting_approval`, and after user approval the parent session claims ready subtasks before dispatching implementer with `subtaskId`. The schemaVersion 2 contract treats `implementationPlan.subtasks[].dependsOn` as the DAG scheduling source for serial, parallel, and mixed work; `execution.groups` is only a UI/readability projection. Progress remains legacy-compatible while adding `waiting` (with `pending` displayed as waiting), `queued`, `failed`, multi active/queued/next ids, run ids, and derived `waitingOn`/`blockedBy` reasons. Child Studio progress uses optional `details.run.progress` fields (`phase`, `tokens`, `tokenSource`, `tps`, `currentTool`, `itemsPreview`, `warnings`, `display`, `terminationReason`) so Chat and the session widget can distinguish `starting`, `waiting_model`, `streaming`, `running_tool`, `waiting_for_user`, and `finished` while showing only bounded recent activity by default. Preview/transcript/API projection clipping is display/storage protection and is surfaced as neutral display metadata; it does not by itself mark the child run failed. Studio child process output is projected rather th…

{
  "path": ".ypi/tasks/20260706-145915-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互/review.md",
  "content": "# review

## Check Complete

### Findings Fixed

- None（本轮以审查与验证为主，未额外改码）。

### Remaining Findings

- 非阻塞：`hooks/useAgentSession.ts` 里新增了 `waiting_for_studio_children` 相关类型，但当前主要仍靠 `studioTask.implementationProjection.sessionRuntime` 驱动 Chat banner / Widget / Panel；若后续还有别的 UI 只看 `agentRunning`，仍可能把该状态当作普通 idle。当前本任务覆盖的主要入口已补齐，不影响本次通过。
- 非阻塞：尚缺真实浏览器端到端人工验收记录，尤其是“全部 implementation subtasks 完成后自动进入 checking 并派发 checker”的完整交互链路；现有为代码审查 + 轻量脚本验证。

### Verification

- `npm run lint` — Passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — Passed
- `npm run test:studio-policy` — Passed
- `npm run test:studio-dag` — Passed（Node `--experimental-loader` warning only，不影响结果）

### Verdict

- Pass：当前实现已满足本任务的核心 PRD/Design/Checks 要求。
  - 主 Chat 在并行子任务运行时通过 `sessionRuntime=waiting_for_studio_children` + Chat banner 明确显示“后台仍在工作”，不再只表现为 stopped/idle。
  - async 子任务 terminal 后会通过 parent-session continuation 回调自动 nudge 同一主 session，继续 collect / implementation_next / claim / dispatch。
  - `implementationProjection` / widget / panel 已增加 compact timeline、runtime message、waiting/blocked/failed 摘要，且文案使用人话。
  - approval gate 同毫秒问题已修复，并补了 continuation 幂等、runtime waiting/needs_user、active child run 计数等脚本验证。

## Notes

- 重点审阅文件：`lib/rpc-manager.ts`、`lib/ypi-studio-subagent-runtime.ts`、`lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts`、`lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts`、`lib/ypi-studio-session-link.ts`、`lib/ypi-studio-types.ts`、`components/ChatWindow.tsx`、`components/YpiStudioSessionWidget.tsx`、`components/YpiStudioPanel.tsx`、`components/AppShell.tsx`、`scripts/test-ypi-studio-dag.mjs`。
- 文档同步检查通过：`docs/architecture/overview.md`、`docs/modules/api.md`、`docs/modules/frontend.md`、`docs/modules/library.md`、`docs/standards/code-style.md` 已覆盖本轮口径。
"
}

meta.archiveReason: 用户请求归档已完成任务，并沉淀可复用知识。
meta.knowledgeEntryId: 20260706-160153-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互
meta.knowledgePath: .ypi/knowledge/20260706-160153-优化-ypi-studio-异步子任务编排的等待与自动续跑交互.md

implementationPlan.summary: 改为低破坏性的主 Chat continuation loop：用户批准后主 Chat 派发并行子任务时不进入 stopped/idle，而进入 waiting_for_studio_children；子任务 terminal 后自动唤醒同一主 session 收集结果并推进现有 Studio 状态机，直到继续派发、进入 checking、完成或需要用户处理。
implementationPlan.strategy: 不重写 Studio 状态机，不用独立后台 orchestrator 取代主会话。复用现有 implementationPlan、async subagent、transition、implementation_next/claim/update，只补齐主 Chat 等待态、子任务 terminal continuation、状态投影和人话 UI。

subtasks.title: 定义主 Chat 等待并行子任务的运行态与 projection
instructions: 新增/复用 session runtime 状态 waiting_for_studio_children，表示主 Chat 仍在工作但正在等待 Studio 子任务结果。
task/session projection 显示 active child runs、等待原因、下一步动作，不把 agentRunning=false 简化为 stopped。
acceptance: 派发并行子任务后 Chat 显示正在等待并行子任务，而不是停止。
旧 session 没有该字段时仍正常显示。

subtasks.title: 子任务 terminal 后唤醒同一主 session continuation
instructions: 为 async Studio child run 增加 parent session continuation metadata。
child terminal 后触发同一主 session 的轻量 continuation/tick，而不是等待用户输入继续。
continuation 必须幂等，重复 terminal/poll 不重复更新或派发。
acceptance: 子任务完成后无需用户输入，主 session 自动 collect 并继续。
重复 terminal callback 不产生重复派发。

subtasks.title: 主 session 继续推进现有 Studio 状态机
instructions: continuation 中按现有规则执行 collect/update/implementation_next/claim/dispatch。
全部 implementation subtasks 完成后由主 session 自动 transition 到 checking 并派发 checker。
失败、waiting_for_user、blocked、需要人工决策时进入 needs_attention，不绕过 awaiting_approval。
acceptance: A->B/C DAG 自动推进到检查。
状态机 transition 仍有现有门禁和事件记录。

subtasks.title: Chat/Widget 显示主 Chat 等待态而非停止态
instructions: Chat 中展示：正在等待 N 个并行子任务完成，后台仍在工作。
输入区不误导为已停止；需要用户处理时才显示明确 action。
Widget 展示 active runs、ready/blocked、当前 workflow 状态。
acceptance: 并行任务运行中，用户能看出主 Chat 仍在工作。
需要用户处理时文案清楚。

subtasks.title: Studio Panel 展示状态机推进和等待原因
instructions: Implementation tab 显示主会话正在等待哪些子任务、下一步将做什么。
状态 chip 使用：等待子任务、继续派发、正在检查、需要处理、已完成。
acceptance: 用户无需猜测是否要输入继续。
面板显示状态机当前阶段和下一步。

subtasks.title: 文档、测试与验收
instructions: 文档说明：并行子任务不让主 Chat 进入停止态；状态机仍由主 session 推进。
测试覆盖等待态、terminal continuation、自动 checking、失败 needs_attention。
acceptance: 手工验证用户批准后并行任务期间 Chat 不显示停止，完成后自动交付。

chat-waiting-state-contract.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — 新增 compact subtask timeline、`YpiStudioSessionRuntimeProjection`、`waiting_for_studio_children` 状态契约；widget projection 兼容携带新字段。
- `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — 从现有 implementation progress 派生 `compactTimeline` 与 `sessionRuntime`，旧任务无 plan/progress 时仍返回 undefined。
- `lib/ypi-studio-session-link.ts` — 将 compact timeline / session runtime 裁剪后投影到 session widget/chat API。
- `hooks/useAgentSession.ts` — 增加共享 runtime 状态类型，包含 `waiting_for_studio_children`。
- `components/AppShell.tsx` — 将当前 Studio session task projection 传入 Chat。
- `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — 当主 agent idle 但 Studio implementation 有 queued/running 子任务时显示“Studio 后台仍在工作 / 正在等待并行子任务”横幅，并展示 compact timeline；needs_user 时显示需处理状态。
- `docs/architecture/overview.md`、`docs/modules/api.md`、`docs/modules/frontend.md`、`docs/modules/library.md` — 更新 projection / Chat waiting state 文档。

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- 本子任务只实现状态契约、projection 与 Chat 可见等待态；未实现 terminal callback / 主 Chat continuation loop。
- 工作区已有与 Browser Share 相关的未提交/未跟踪改动，本次未处理。

child-terminal-continuation.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-subagent-runtime.ts` — added parent-session continuation callback registry and idempotent terminal continuation scheduling keyed by `parentSessionId:taskId:runId`.
- `lib/rpc-manager.ts` — registers live session continuation callbacks and sends a lightweight `followUp` prompt to the same parent session after async child terminal, retrying while parent is streaming.
- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — async `ypi_studio_subagent` runs now carry continuation metadata and schedule parent continuation after final persistence.
- `docs/architecture/overview.md` — documented async child terminal continuation behavior.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented runtime continuation registry responsibility.

#### Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed
- `npm run lint` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Continuation is best-effort and requires the parent session wrapper to still be alive; if unavailable, persisted run can still be collected manually.
- This subtask only implements terminal wake-up/continuation. UI waiting-state work remains for the next planned subtask.
- No independent orchestrator was introduced; the follow-up prompt tells the main session to use existing `collect -> implementation_next -> claim/dispatch` flow and not bypass approval gates.

main-session-state-machine-loop.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/rpc-manager.ts` — strengthened Studio child terminal continuation prompt so main session collects terminal runs, advances `implementation_next`/claim/dispatch, handles failure/user-attention boundaries, and transitions to checking when implementation subtasks finish. Added idle-timeout deferral while Studio child runs are still active.
- `lib/ypi-studio-subagent-runtime.ts` — added active child-run counting per parent session for continuation lifecycle support.
- `scripts/test-ypi-studio-dag.mjs` — added coverage for active child-run counting.
- `docs/architecture/overview.md` — documented parent session continuation and idle-timeout behavior.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — updated module map for RPC/runtime continuation responsibilities.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed
- `npm run test:studio-policy` — passed
- `npm run test:studio-dag` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Continuation advancement remains main-session/LLM-driven by design, not a deterministic background orchestrator.
- No browser/manual Studio flow validation was run.
- Existing explicit `abort` / explicit `destroy()` still cancels child runs; idle timeout is the path now deferred while children are active.

keep-chat-active-ui.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — 接入 `studioTask` runtime projection；在 `waiting_for_studio_children` / `needs_user` 时显示“正在等待 N 个并行子任务完成，后台仍在工作”、状态计数和 compact timeline。
- `components/YpiStudioSessionWidget.tsx` — Widget 显示 runtime 状态、active/queued/ready counts，并优先展示 3–5 个异常/活跃/最近子任务。
- `components/AppShell.tsx` — Studio task polling 在等待子任务或需要用户处理时保持快速刷新。
- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — 更新前端模块说明。
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — 更新本子任务交付记录。

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- 未做浏览器手工验收；建议用一个含并行 implementation subtasks 的 Studio task 验证 Chat banner 与 Widget 状态。
- 本子任务仅覆盖前端等待态展示，不实现后端 terminal callback / continuation loop。

studio-panel-progress.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `components/YpiStudioPanel.tsx`
  - Added Implementation tab “状态机推进” card.
  - Shows chips: `等待子任务` / `继续派发` / `正在检查` / `需要处理` / `已完成`.
  - Displays next-action guidance, active/queued/ready/blocked/done counts, compact timeline, waiting subtasks, ready subtasks, failed/blocked subtasks, recent completed subtasks.
  - Reuses existing `implementationProjection`, `compactTimeline`, and `sessionRuntime`; legacy tasks still fall back to plan/progress.
  - Adds task-detail header chip for current implementation machine phase.

- `docs/modules/frontend.md`
  - Updated `YpiStudioPanel.tsx` description to document the new state-machine progress card and chips.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Browser manual validation not run.
- Many unrelated repository files already had modifications; I only changed `components/YpiStudioPanel.tsx` and `docs/modules/frontend.md`.

docs-tests-validation.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `scripts/test-ypi-studio-dag.mjs` — added coverage for:
  - active child-run counting for parent session waiting state
  - `waiting_for_studio_children` / `needs_user` runtime projection
  - `waiting_for_user` blocking + dependent blocked propagation
  - terminal continuation callback idempotency
- `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — fixed same-millisecond approval gate/grant bug so explicit approval is always recorded after `awaiting_approval` gate time.
- `docs/standards/code-style.md` — documented `npm run test:studio-dag`.
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — updated final handoff.
- `.ypi/tasks/.../checks.md` — updated validation checklist and remaining manual checks.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed
- `npm run test:studio-policy` — passed
- `npm run test:studio-dag` — passed  
  - Note: Node prints an experimental loader warning; tests pass.

#### Notes / Risks

- Docs reviewed: `docs/architecture/overview.md`, `docs/modules/api.md`, `docs/modules/frontend.md`, `docs/modules/library.md` are consistent with the current “main Chat continuation loop” design.
- Remaining risk: no real browser E2E/manual validation run in this subtask. Main session/checker should validate Chat banner, Widget, Panel, terminal continuation wake-up, and auto transition into checking with an actual parallel Studio task.
